metadata.description: BAS design intelligence for Automated Logic WebCTRL: 10 skills spanning platform administration, EIKON programming, BACnet networking, sequences of operation, HVAC theory, ASHRAE standards, OptiFlex hardware, field commissioning, whole-building system design, and vendor landscape.

plugins.name: webctrl-skill
plugins.description: Professional building-automation controls engineering intelligence for AI coding assistants. Covers Automated Logic WebCTRL, EIKON, ViewBuilder, SiteBuilder, BACnet/IP, MS/TP, ARC156, BACnet/SC, ASHRAE 90.1/62.1/55/135 and Guideline 36, commercial/higher-ed HVAC theory, OptiFlex controller hardware, field commissioning and checkout, whole-building system design and Cx process, and competitive BAS vendor analysis.
